Instruction: You are a shopper keen on finding discounts (User ID: sarah_green_567). analysis:
1. Check whether the wine in your hand, which has gold foil wrapping around the bottle neck, is on discount.

2. If it is on discount, search for wines that are also on discount and have a lower tax rate than this wine. Add the wine with the lowest sugar content to the cart. If there are multiple wines tied for the lowest sugar content among those that meet the conditions, add all of them to the cart.

3. If it is not on discount, search for wines priced between 100 and 300 yuan that have the "low-fat" characteristic. Add the wine with the largest discount (smallest discount factor) to the cart. 4. Calculate the total amount payable for all items in the shopping cart.
